leadText: The Mark Charm (Japanese: あかしのおまもり Mark Charm) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Generation VIII , the Mark Charm effectively triples the chance for wild Pokémon to generate a mark while the item is in the player 's Bag . In Generation IX , the Mark Charm effectively triples the chance for symbol encounters to generate with a mark while the item is in the player's Bag, excluding wanderers . It does not have any effect on the bonuses applied to Pokémon encountered in Poké Portal News event mass outbreaks .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A mysterious and unique charm that increases the chance of finding a Pokémon with a mark. S V Having one of these mysterious and unique charms makes it more likely you’ll encounter a Pokémon with a mark.

It does not have any effect on the bonuses applied to Pokémon encountered in Poké Portal News event mass outbreaks . Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh IA Armor Station (from the Doctor that gives the player their Isle of Armor Pokédex for completing it) S V ID Blueberry Academy (from Cyrano after completing the Blueberry Pokédex , excluding event Pokémon )
